svg.title: How Wenlan keeps knowledge current without erasing its history
svg.desc: Evidence changes, pages respond, and only ambiguous decisions reach you.
svg.text: Evidence changes, pages respond, and only ambiguous decisions reach you.
Promote when uncontradicted; confirm by review
Keep the old claim and its replacement linked
Soft-suppress, never delete; protected knowledge stays untouched
Evidence changes mark affected pages stale
Route evidence to the right page
Machine changes become a pending revision
Your prose is never silently overwritten
Accepted knowledge returns through Brief · Recall · Pages · MCP
¹ Summary rollup: optional, default off · ² Eviction: optional, default off; archive, never delete
